name: python3.13-gdbm
title: python3.13-gdbm
summary: GNU dbm database support for Python (v3.13)
description:
GNU dbm database support for Python (v3.13)
GNU dbm database module for Python. Install this if you want to
create or read GNU dbm database files with Python.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3.13-gdbm because GNU dbm database support for Python (v3.13).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3.13-gdbm as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3.13-gdbm with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3.13-gdbm --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
